about.title: About the Institute
about.description: The Public Association "Institute for Legislative Creation and Comparative Law" is a non-commercial organization voluntarily constituted for the realization of non-commercial purposes, in accordance with the Constitution of the Republic of Moldova and Law No. 86 of June 11, 2020.
about.missionText: Supporting and studying knowledge-based society through legal, cultural, and scientific analysis of national and universal socio-legal processes, as well as developing socio-legal research across various domains.
about.visionText: To be a center of excellence in socio-legal research, promoting democracy, human rights, national and civic values and interests, partnership, and the rule of law at national and international levels.
principles: Voluntary constitution — no one can be compelled to found or become a member of the association
Freedom to establish internal structure, goals, and activities
Freedom to solicit, receive, and use financial and material means from within the country or abroad
Promotion of national and civic values and interests, democracy, and the rule of law
Transparent activity — publication of the annual activity report
goals: Development and implementation of socio-legal research programs at national and international levels
Establishment and consolidation of national and international scientific cooperation
Promotion of democracy and human rights
Stimulation of civic spirit and activism, including participation in decision-making processes
Editorial activity and dissemination of information
Supporting the involvement of scientific communities and professional associations in relevant programs
Representation and support of members' professional interests
Promotion of human dignity and elimination of all forms of discrimination
activities: Implementation and promotion of civic, economic, cultural, and educational initiatives
Financing programs through grants, scholarships, and financial aid
Representing and defending the legitimate interests of members
Development and expertise of legislative act projects
Creation of enterprises and organizations with legal entity rights
